languages.text: Узнав о схизме Эоганна, технодознаватель Медный шепот лично явился к бывшему коллеге и вызвал того на богословский диспут. Говорят, что их спор продолжался несколько циклов, а стены технособора искрились от наполнивших ноосферу бинарных арий и аргументов. Столь могучи были звучавшие доводы, что последователи Эоганна стали разобщены — многие отринули его учение и вступили в битву с теми, кто остался верен. Конфликт пылал так яростно, что в итоге технособор был обрушен, унеся жизни тысяч техножрецов. Из-под обломков твердыни живым выбрался лишь Эоганн, ни на секунду не прервавший диспут с Медным шепотом. Вознеся краткую литанию в память о брате во служении, он захоронил его согласно обычаям, и отправился в новые странствия.

Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper sought out his former colleague in person and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their dispute lasted several cycles, and the walls of the tech-cathedral sparked and reverberated from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that Eogunn's followers splintered — many renounced his teachings and took up arms against those who remained faithful. The conflict raged so fiercely that it brought the tech-cathedral crashing down, claiming the lives of thousands of Tech-Priests. Eogunn never paused in his debate with Brasswhisper for a single second, and only he emerged from beneath the rubble. After offering a brief litany in memory of his brother in service, Eogunn buried him in accordance with custom and set out on new wanderings.

Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that even the machine spirits themselves could not withstand them, and, incensed by a cascade of the Motive Force, they brought the stronghold crashing down upon the Tech-Priests, claiming the lives of thousands of the sect's followers. Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.

languages.text: 在得知伊奥贡的叛离后，技术审讯官铜语亲自找到昔日的同僚，向他发起了一场神学辩论。据说他们的哲学对决持续了数个周期，堡垒的墙壁因饱含通感空间的二进制咏叹和争鸣而火花四溅、震颤不已。他们的论断如此强大，连机魂本身都无法承受。随后机魂因一连串的源力而陷入狂怒，使整座堡垒轰然坍塌，将技术神甫们埋葬其中，数千名教派追随者因此丧命。堡垒废墟之下，仅伊奥贡一人幸存。他简短地悼念了同僚一番，便踏上了新的游历之路。
languages.original_text: Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that even the machine spirits themselves could not withstand them, and, incensed by a cascade of the Motive Force, they brought the stronghold crashing down upon the Tech-Priests, claiming the lives of thousands of the sect's followers. Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.

languages.text: Als er von Eogunns Spaltung hörte, suchte Tech-Interrogator Messingflüsterer seinen einstigen Kollegen persönlich auf, um eine theologische Debatte mit ihm zu führen. Angeblich zog sich ihr philosophisches Duell über mehrere Zyklen hin und die Mauern der Festung erzitterten angesichts der binhärischen Arien und Argumente, die die Noosphäre erfüllten. Die Thesen waren so stark, dass ihnen nicht einmal die Maschinengeister selbst widerstehen konnten und die Festung — ausgelöst durch eine Kaskade von Antriebskraft — über den Techpriestern zum Einsturz brachten und Tausende Anhänger der Sekte töteten. Nur Eogunn gelang es, sich aus den Ruinen der Festung zu befreien. Nach einer kurzen Gedenklitanei für seinen Kollegen brach er zu neuen Ufern auf.

Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.

languages.text: Eogunn'un yaşadığı bölünmeyi öğrenen Tekno Sorgucu Pirinçfısıltı, bizzat eski meslektaşını arayıp buldu ve onu teolojik bir tartışmaya davet etti. Felsefi düellolarının birkaç döngü sürdüğü ve kalenin duvarlarının Noosfer'i dolduran ikilidil nağmelerden ve argümanlardan kıvılcımlar saçıp titrediği söylenir. Öne sürülen fikirler o kadar güçlüydü ki makine ruhları bile bunlara dayanamadı ve Devinim Gücü akımlarının öfkesiyle kaleyi Tekno Rahiplerin üzerine yıktı. Tarikatın binlerce takipçisi canından oldu. Kalenin yıkıntıları altından sadece Eogunn çıktı. Meslektaşının anısına kısa bir ilahi okuduktan sonra yeni yolculuklara yelken açtı.
languages.original_text: Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that even the machine spirits themselves could not withstand them, and, incensed by a cascade of the Motive Force, they brought the stronghold crashing down upon the Tech-Priests, claiming the lives of thousands of the sect's followers. Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.

languages.text: Tras saber del cisma de Eogunn, la tecnointerrogadora Susurro de Latón buscó personalmente a su antiguo colega y lo retó a un debate teológico. Se dice que aquel duelo de filosofías se prolongó durante varios ciclos, y que las paredes mismas de la fortaleza se estremecían y chisporroteaban bajo el efecto de las arias binarias y las desavenencias que llenaron la noosfera. Tan potentes eran sus aseveraciones que ni siquiera los espíritus máquina fueron capaces de resistirlas y, enardecidos por un aluvión de Fuerza Motriz, derribaron la fortaleza sobre las cabezas de los tecnosacerdotes, matando a miles de adeptos. Eogunn fue el único que emergió con vida de entre las ruinas de la fortaleza. Tras recitar una breve letanía en memoria de su difunta colega, partió en busca de nuevos horizontes.
languages.original_text: Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. languages.text: Apprenant le schisme d'Eogunn, le techno-interrogateur Murmecuivre se mit personnellement en quête de son ancien collègue et lui proposa un débat théologique de haut vol. À en croire la rumeur, leur duel philosophique dura plusieurs cycles, et les murs du bastion scintillèrent et vibrèrent au son des disputes et arias binhaires qui emplissaient la noosphère. Leurs arguments étaient si puissants que même les esprits de la machine ne purent les supporter et, excédés par une cascade de Force Motrice, ils firent s'écrouler le bastion sur les technoprêtres, tuant sur le coup des milliers d'adeptes de la secte. Seul Eogunn émergea indemne des ruines de la forteresse. Ayant offert une courte litanie en mémoire de son collègue, il partit pour de nouvelles pérégrinations.
languages.original_text: Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that even the machine spirits themselves could not withstand them, and, incensed by a cascade of the Motive Force, they brought the stronghold crashing down upon the Tech-Priests, claiming the lives of thousands of the sect's followers. Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.

À en croire la rumeur, leur duel philosophique dura plusieurs cycles, et les murs du bastion scintillèrent et vibrèrent au son des disputes et arias binhaires qui emplissaient la noosphère. Leurs arguments étaient si puissants que même les esprits de la machine ne purent les supporter et, excédés par une cascade de Force Motrice, ils firent s'écrouler le bastion sur les technoprêtres, tuant sur le coup des milliers d'adeptes de la secte. Seul Eogunn émergea indemne des ruines de la forteresse. Ayant offert une courte litanie en mémoire de son collègue, il partit pour de nouvelles pérégrinations.

languages.text: エオガンの分裂を知るや、テック・インテロゲイターのブラスウィスパーは自ら、かつての同僚を捜し出し、神学論争を挑んだ。彼らの哲学的決闘は数サイクルにも及び、ノースフィアを満たすビナリックのアリアと論争によって、要塞の壁は火花を散らし、震えたと言われている。なされた主張があまりに強力であったため、機械精霊そのものさえ耐えきれず、駆動力の奔流に激昂し、技術司祭たちの頭上に要塞を崩落させ、宗派の信徒数千の命を奪った。瓦礫の下から現れたのはエオガンただ一人であった。同僚を悼む短き祈祷を捧げた後、彼は新たなる放浪の旅へと出立したのだった。
languages.original_text: Upon learning of Eogunn's schism, the Tech-Interrogator Brasswhisper personally sought out his former colleague and challenged him to a theological debate. It is said that their philosophical duel lasted several cycles, and the walls of the stronghold sparked and shuddered from the binharic arias and arguments that filled the Noosphere. So powerful were the assertions made that even the machine spirits themselves could not withstand them, and, incensed by a cascade of the Motive Force, they brought the stronghold crashing down upon the Tech-Priests, claiming the lives of thousands of the sect's followers. Only Eogunn emerged from beneath the ruins of the fortress. After offering a brief litany in memory of his colleague, he set out on new wanderings.
